c.f: IF(Nut_StatusTool!$L$3="BARMM","Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao",IF(Nut_StatusTool!$L$3="CAR","Cordillera Administrative Region",IF(Nut_StatusTool!$L$3="CARAGA","Region XIII - CARAGA",IF(Nut_StatusTool!$L$3="NCR","National Capital Region",Nut_StatusTool!$L$3))))
IF(Summary!$X$30=0,"","Child(ren) 0-59 mos. with no height taken")
IF(Summary!$X$30=0,"","Child(ren) 0-59 mos. with no height taken")

conditionalFormatting.sqref: C8:G8 AE8:AI8 BG8:BK8 X7:Y7 AZ7:BA7 CE7:CF7 BS8:BT8 N10 P10 R10 AR10 AT10 BT10 BV10 AP10:AP11 BR10:BR11 AD53:AJ53 AO53:AT53 AY53:BC53 BF53:BM53 BQ53:BW53 CD53:CI53

dataValidation.prompt: Please indicate the wasting + severe wasting combined prevalence rates from last year.
Please indicate the stunting + severe stunting combined prevalence rates from last year.
Please indicate the UW + SUW combined prevalence rates from last year.
Please write the names of the indigenous groups or tribes present in this barangay.
